ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deployment under which this observation was recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the observed species */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals observed */,
  "life_stage" TEXT /* Life stage of the observed individuals */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments related to the observation */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat where the observation was made */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who made the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_scientific_name FOREIGN KEY ("scientific_name") REFERENCES species ("scientific_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_life_stage FOREIGN KEY ("life_stage") REFERENCES life_stages ("stage_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observation deployment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the deployment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the deployment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for this deployment */,
  "deployment_name" TEXT /* Unique name for the deployment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the deployment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the deployment */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the deployment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the deployment takes place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat_preference" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "reproductive_rate" TEXT /* Reproductive rate of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the researcher */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile picture of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the life stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the life stage */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the life stage */,
  "physical_characteristics" TEXT /* Key physical characteristics of the life stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "observation_id" TEXT /* Reference to the observation linked to this comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat at the location */,
  "ecoregion" TEXT /* Ecoregion where the location is situated */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_stage_observations" (
  "observation_id" TEXT /* Reference to the observation */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the life stage */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the life stage identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id", "stage_id")
)
